prep.summary: You need to brief Abe on the Celonis pivot—specifically the June 8 proof-of-concept demonstrating direct Kafka event ingestion to bypass Beam and reduce latency to minutes. This back-end process mining must harmonize with Scan AI—the desktop-capturing tool run out of the Contact Center—to build a unified Business Health Scorecard. While the work notes lack specific details on Enterprise Architecture staffing, you must discuss resource allocation during this sync—focusing on who will draft the pending EA-level position paper to formalize this multi-tool framework.
tasks: Finalize the Enterprise Architecture position paper—collaborating with Suhas—to establish the enterprise-wide process observability framework.
Define the EA staffing requirements—specifically identifying architects to own the Celonis, ScanAI, and Beam integration—before the next planning cycle.
Align with Abe on resisting the $5 million all-in-one ServiceNow proposal—leveraging the cheaper, existing Kafka-Celonis pipeline instead.
Coordinate with Sean Garner to review the cross-functional business case—ensuring Bank and P&C requirements match the technical capabilities.
prep.title: Monthly Sync with Abe
